Localization.Description: An authentication request to an NPS

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is trying to authenticate using the NPS on host {event_src.host}
The NPS on host {event_src.host} sent a request to a RADIUS client for additional information for user {subject.account.name}
The NPS on host {event_src.host} denied access to a host to user {subject.account.name}
Unsuccessful attempt to authenticate to the NPS on host {event_src.host}
The NPS on host {event_src.host} granted access to a host to user {subject.account.name}
The NPS on host {event_src.host} sent a data accounting response to user {subject.account.name}
User {subject.account.name} sent a data accounting request to the NPS on host {event_src.host}
